implementation_owners: sealed v21 matrix analyzer and 18-case execution agents

allowed_for_initial_working_draft: The factual 18-case matrix composition, case identifiers, parameter coordinates, fixed 600 s duration, 0.1 s nominal step, and the predeclared 60-600 s statistics window.

Directly traceable per-case 60-600 s min, max, signed absolute peak and time, mean, RMS, and population standard deviation for the 26 sealed response fields, with exact field names and units preserved.

The derived I(t)=RAC(t)-RA(t)-RC(t)+R0(t) time series and its descriptive statistics, explicitly labeled as a factorial interaction contrast rather than proof of physical interaction or non-superposition.

The derived Cp(t)=y135(t)-(y85(t)+y185(t))/2 time series, absolute statistics, and RAC-RMS-normalized statistics, explicitly labeled as a centered three-pressure contrast. Cp must not be called a hydrodynamic pressure coefficient or a pressure second derivative.

The five-point L and m axis values, adjacent slopes, second differences, scaled second differences, and linear-fit residual diagnostics, provided they retain the no-engineering-tolerance and no-binary-linearity labels.
The 3 x 3 affine, affine-plus-L*m, and quadratic predictions and residual diagnostics, preferably reporting residuals and condition-number caveats rather than ranking raw coefficients.
Figures or tables generated directly from the sealed matrix_analysis.json or sealed derived CSV, with the analysis-result-seal hash and this review boundary recorded in the working-draft source note.
prohibited_for_initial_or_formal_paper_c: A causal statement that one load source or parameter causes the observed contrast solely because I or Cp is nonzero.

A claim of exact superposition, non-superposition, linearity, nonlinearity, monotonicity, statistical significance, or physical curvature without a declared engineering tolerance and uncertainty or repeatability analysis.

Calling Cp a conventional pressure coefficient, a nondimensional pressure, or a second derivative with respect to pressure; the stored absolute Cp has the response unit and is not divided by the 50 bar spacing squared.
Using the 3 x 3 raw polynomial coefficients as robust sensitivity rankings without centering or scaling and conditioning analysis.
An optimum pressure, optimum L or m, design recommendation, safety margin, structural adequacy, soil applicability, or generalization beyond the sealed input window.
Cross-generation comparison with v13, v15, v19, v20, the old 14-case manuscript material, or other AQWA/source layers unless a separate same-source evidence contract is reviewed.
Promotion to official evidence, alteration of an evidence manifest, or modification/replacement of the authoritative Word manuscript under this review.
required_labels_and_caveats: Mark all included numbers and figures as candidate descriptive simulation results pending evidence-manifest and manuscript promotion.
Describe 60-600 s as the predefined statistics window, not as a statistically proven steady or stationary interval.
Preserve each response unit and distinguish absolute Cp, normalized Cp, time-series contrast, summary-feature fit, and physical response magnitude.

For spud_yaw_psi_rad, spud_lateral_y_m, soil_lateral_displacement_m, and soil_force_y_total_N, state that the RAC RMS scale and Cp are both zero; do not interpret the normalized zero as sensitivity evidence.
Retain the single-generation, deterministic, no-repeat, no-uncertainty-analysis boundary.

evidence: The independently computed analysis-result-seal SHA-256 is 7f633021459e55361785d92cc5ebc4322594c316ccb1a5b825ab55cb16ffc960. Both derived files match the hashes recorded in that seal.

All 18 current per-case result-seal hashes exactly match both matrix_analysis/result_seal.json and full_matrix_run_review_seal.json; the ready candidate and analyzer hashes also match their upstream seals.

The derived table has 5401 rows and 79 columns: time_s plus three derived channels for each of 26 response fields. Its time axis is exactly the source axis from 60.0 through 600.0 s, with nominal 0.1 s spacing.

Independent source-table recomputation produced maximum absolute differences of 7.457856554538012e-09 for I(t), 5.591573426499963e-09 for Cp(t), and 1.3067324999838092e-13 for normalized Cp. The largest derived-summary difference was 1.862645149230957e-09.
Independent 60-600 s per-case statistics agree with sealed metrics.json values to maximum scaled difference 9.603815820811292e-12.

All 26 x 6 x 2 five-point axis diagnostics reproduce their point order, values, slopes, second differences, linear fits, residuals, ranks, and singular values; the maximum scaled numeric difference is 4.0398692433297435e-09.

All 26 x 6 x 3 soil-model fits reproduce their term order, coefficients, residual vectors, RSS, RMSE, maximum residuals, ranks, and singular values; the maximum scaled numeric difference is 1.744043785493782e-10.
The affine, affine-plus-L*m, and quadratic design matrices are full rank at 3, 4, and 6 respectively. The analysis JSON and all independently recomputed derived channels contain no NaN or infinity.
process_correctness.finding: The analysis lineage, file hashes, time bases, formulas, summary statistics, five-point diagnostics, and 3 x 3 fits were independently rehashed and recomputed from the sealed per-case full-resolution tables. All recomputations agree with the sealed outputs within floating-point summation and CSV round-trip tolerances.

evidence: For the four zero-RAC-RMS channels, both the absolute pressure contrast and the normalized contrast are exactly zero. The 1e-30 denominator floor therefore introduces no hidden large value, but these normalized zeros carry no physical scale information.

The largest normalized pressure-contrast peak is 2.9117847505867274 for roll_phi_deg; yaw_psi_rad is 2.510941227307064. Ratios above one are arithmetically valid because the contrast peak is normalized by RAC RMS, not by a compatible peak norm, and must not be presented as a failure threshold.

The raw-basis quadratic design condition number is 3893.0529399837974 and the affine-plus-interaction condition number is 515.5721682318305. Predictions and residuals reproduce correctly, but raw polynomial coefficients are basis-scale sensitive and are unsuitable for unqualified coefficient ranking.

The worst maximum-residual-to-grid-scale ratio is 44.0% for the affine model, 26.9% for affine plus L*m, and 19.8% for the quadratic model, all for yaw_psi_rad minimum. These residuals reinforce the declared descriptive-only policy and preclude a binary linearity claim.
The 60-600 s label is a predeclared statistics window. This analysis did not conduct a stationarity, uncertainty, repeatability, convergence-with-time-step, or experimental validation study.
No authoritative soil displacement, force, moment, or structural safety limits are present in this evidence package, so engineering applicability remains unevaluated.
result_reasonableness.finding: GO for the sealed analysis result as a faithful descriptive diagnostic. The values are finite and internally coherent, but neither small nor large contrasts, fitted coefficients, or residual sizes establish engineering linearity, causality, superposition, safety, or an optimum.

evidence: PRE_RUN.md and the ready-bound analyze_matrix.py predeclare the 60-600 s window, I(t)=RAC(t)-RA(t)-RC(t)+R0(t), the centered 85/135/185 bar pressure contrast, two five-point center axes, and the 3 x 3 soil fits.

The full-matrix run review seal 94933282e44574b741e4c7736a92d32ed6f476c90c7531424f1e72dfcb697b58 explicitly authorized exactly one execution of analyze_matrix.py with SHA-256 e8379de5754cd3e4f933555055d17a405ae4912b934a579ee80032b1d543a98f.
The analysis result seal and matrix_analysis.json both retain paper_evidence_promoted=false, while the execution review retains trend_conclusions_authorized=false.

The current paper authority declared by paper/AGENTS.md is repo_ref:project_root\paper\绞吸挖泥船绞刀冲击载荷传递特性.docx, SHA-256 c97a17512805bc6394f5577a72f96bca1d89db16962255fe85255d52f142e655. Read-only OOXML inspection found no 600 s, Cp, or current 18-case matrix material in that document.
starting_premise.finding: The correct bounded question is whether the single sealed matrix-analysis result faithfully implements the predeclared descriptive contrasts and regression diagnostics over the current 18-case v21 generation. This review may authorize traceable descriptive material for an initial working draft, but it does not authorize trend conclusions, formal physical conclusions, evidence-manifest promotion, or direct modification of the authoritative Word manuscript.
